series_metadata.series_description: Cost allocation plans and related correspondence to and from the federalgovernment detailing operating expenditures of the agency.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrativevalue, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain in office 3 years and 4 years in therecords center, then destroy providedaudits have been completed and released,and all discrepancies have been resolved., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
